pi_items.source: Task README.md and task description specifying the user acts as a Data Protection Officer handling GDPR compliance.
O*NET Online (https://www.onetonline.org/link/summary/13-1041.06). 13-1041.06 is for Coroners, while Compliance Managers are 11-9199.02 and Compliance Officers are 13-1041.00.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a Safe Exam Browser server to comply with GDPR data minimisation principles for a mock university, involving only synthetically generated data created by the agent. The task's expected configuration names ('GDPR Compliant Exam Config', 'Privacy-First Connection', 'GDPR Exam Template', 'Minimal Monitoring') and the expected username ('dpo.officer') are all explicitly verified against the task description and validation scripts. However, the provided O*NET SOC code 13-1041.06 incorrectly maps to Coroners, contradicting the intended Compliance Manager role, which should map to 11-9199.02 or 13-1041.00.
